zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume V de Montferrat於大約1115年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞時，他的父親Rénier Ier de Montferrat32歲，母親Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté42歲。他於1133年3月28日與Judith von Babenberg在義大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1147年登記服兵役。他去世於1191年12月8日在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農صور享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume V de Montferrat于大约1115年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞时，他的父亲Rénier Ier de Montferrat32岁，母亲Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté42岁。他于1133年3月28日与Judith von Babenberg在意大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1147年登记服兵役。他去世于1191年12月8日在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農صور享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume V de Montferrat was born about 1115, in Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Rénier Ier de Montferrat, was 32 and his mother, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, was 42. He married Judith von Babenberg on 28 March 1133, in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1147. He died on 8 December 1191, in Tyre, South Lebanon, Lebanon, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume V de Montferrat est né environ 1115, à Alessandria, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Rénier Ier de Montferrat, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Judith von Babenberg le 28 mars 1133, à Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1147. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1191, à Tyre, Liban-Sud, Liban, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume V de Montferrat um 1115 in Alessandria, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rénier Ier de Montferrat 32 und seine Mutter Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté 42. Er hat am 28. März 1133 in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italien Judith von Babenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1147 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1191 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Tyre, Liban-Sud, Libanon.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume V de Montferrat è nato il circa 1115 nel Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Rénier Ier de Montferrat, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Judith von Babenberg il 28 marzo 1133, nel Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1147. Morì il 8 dicembre 1191, nel Tyre, Liban-Sud, Libano, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de Montferratが約1115年にイタリアピエモントアレッサンドリアで生まれた時，父Rénier Ier de Montferratは32歳，母Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéは42歳であった。1133年3月28日にイタリアピエモントアレッサンドリアモンフエラトーでJudith von Babenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年に兵役登録をした。彼は1191年12月8日にレバノンソウス レバノンصورで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de Montferrat(이)가 대략 1115년 이탈리아 피몽 알레산드리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rénier Ier de Montferrat(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1133년 3월 28일 이탈리아 피몽 알레산드리아 몬페라토에서 Judith von Babenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1191년 12월 8일 레바논 소우스 레바넌 صور에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume V de Montferrat nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Alessandria, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Rénier Ier de Montferrat, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith von Babenberg em 28 de março de 1133, em Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1147. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1191, em Tyre, Liban-Sud, Líbano, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume V de Montferrat родился около 1115 г. в местности алессэндря, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Rénier Ier de Montferrat было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith von Babenberg 28 марта 1133 г. в местности монфиррато, алессэндря, пиемонт, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1147 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 декабря 1191 г. в местности صور, соут лебанон, Ливан в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.from 1140 to 1144 AD: mai le 1140 e o'o I le 1144
sm.from about 1136 to 1191: mai le e tusa o le 1136 e o'o I le 1191

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume V de Montferrat nació aproximadamente 1115, en Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Rénier Ier de Montferrat, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Judith von Babenberg el 28 de marzo de 1133, en Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1147. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1191, en Tyre, Liban-Sud, Líbano, a la edad de 77 años.
